summary: FREE11 Full Frontend UI Redesign (Gold/Charcoal Dark Theme) - All 14 features tested and verified. All pages render correctly with the new gold/charcoal design system. Auth flow, mobile bottom nav, page interactions, and console error checks all pass.

issues: DOB input uses browser native date picker (type='date') instead of custom shadcn calendar component. Has [color-scheme:dark] applied so it looks dark-themed, but still browser-native. Minor UX inconsistency.
Duplicate .hover-lift class defined twice (lines 209 and 312) - second definition overrides first, different transform values
Duplicate .ripple::after defined twice (lines 288 and 341) - first uses '200px x 200px' fixed, second uses '200% x 200%'. Last one wins (200%).
@media (max-width:640px) forces 'padding-bottom: 80px !important' on ALL .min-h-screen elements which is aggressive but works in practice

feature_test_results.landing_page: PASS - Gold/dark design loaded with hero section, feature cards (6), CTA buttons (START PLAYING / EXPLORE GAMES), nav with login/register buttons
feature_test_results.login_page: PASS - Dark gold theme with FREE11 logo, SIGN IN card, email/password inputs with gold borders, gold gradient submit button
feature_test_results.register_page: PASS - All 6 fields (name, email, mobile, password, DOB, state), OTP step shows dev OTP correctly, gold styling consistent
feature_test_results.dashboard: PASS - User header card, Quick Stats Bar (streak/accuracy/XP), WishlistGoal widget, DailyPuzzle, Live Cricket Hero, Daily Check-in card, Next Reward Progress, Skill Stats, Leaderboard, Recent Transactions, Quick Actions all present
feature_test_results.bottom_nav_mobile: PASS - All 5 items visible on 390px (Home/Play/Missions/Leaderboard/Profile), correctly HIDDEN on desktop (md:hidden)
feature_test_results.match_centre: PASS - MATCH CENTRE heading in gold, Live/Upcoming/Completed tabs (gold active style), 22 upcoming match cards with BUILD TEAM and CONTESTS buttons
feature_test_results.shop_page: PASS - SHOP STORE heading, 8 category filter tabs (gold active), 16 products displayed with gold coin indicators and REDEEM NOW buttons, category filter works (16 all -> 3 recharge)
feature_test_results.earn_coins: PASS - COIN BOOSTERS heading, 3 tabs (How to Earn/Mini Games/Tasks) all functional, 3 mini game cards (Quiz/Spin/Scratch), 5 task items
feature_test_results.leaderboards: PASS - LEADERBOARDS heading with trophy icon, Global/Weekly/Streak tabs with gold active style, Duels section, Activity Feed
feature_test_results.profile: PASS - Gold profile card with avatar, rank badge, XP progress bar, coins card with REDEEM button, stats (3 columns), menu items, Settings toggle, Legal links, Log Out button
feature_test_results.predict_page: PASS - PREDICTIONS heading in gold, stats bar (Total/Correct/Accuracy/Streak), 4 prediction type cards with coin indicators
feature_test_results.contest_hub: PASS - /contest-hub/123 loads with prize banner (1300 coins), filter tabs (All/Official/Joined/Community), Create/Join Code buttons, 3 contest cards (Standard/Practice/H2H)
feature_test_results.no_console_errors: PASS - No console errors found throughout all page testing sessions
feature_test_results.auth_flow: PASS - Registered new user (test_redesign_ui26@free11test.com), OTP flow worked, redirected to match-centre, dashboard showed 100 welcome coins

design_system_verification.card_broadcast: PASS - #1B1E23 background with rgba(255,255,255,0.06) border visible on all page cards
design_system_verification.card_broadcast_gold: PASS - Gold border (rgba(198,160,82,0.2)) visible on user header, live cricket hero, profile header
design_system_verification.btn_gold: PASS - Linear gradient (#C6A052 to #E0B84F) with dark (#0F1115) text on all primary CTAs
design_system_verification.btn_outline_gold: PASS - Transparent bg with gold border and text on secondary actions
design_system_verification.coin_indicator: PASS - Gold pill style visible on product prices, rewards
design_system_verification.font_heading: PASS - Bebas Neue visible on page headings (FREE11, MATCH CENTRE, COIN BOOSTERS, SIGN IN, etc.)
design_system_verification.font_numbers: PASS - Oswald font on coin balances and number stats
design_system_verification.animate_coin_glow: PASS - App logo and avatar animate with gold glow
design_system_verification.animate_live_pulse: PASS - Live indicator dots pulse correctly
design_system_verification.animate_slide_up: PASS - Page content slides in on load
design_system_verification.badge_live: PASS - Red LIVE badge appears on live status indicators
design_system_verification.bg_broadcast_grid: PASS - Subtle gold grid texture visible on login/register backgrounds
design_system_verification.bottom_nav_gold: PASS - Active item highlighted in gold with gold underline indicator

action_items: LOW: Clean up duplicate .hover-lift and .ripple CSS class definitions in index.css (lines 209/312 and 276/322). Currently second definition overrides first.
LOW: Consider replacing DOB input (type='date') with shadcn Calendar component for design consistency with the premium sports broadcast feel
LOW: @media (max-width:640px) padding-bottom: 80px !important on .min-h-screen is overly broad - consider targeting specific page wrappers instead
critical_code_review_comments: index.css has duplicate class definitions for .hover-lift (lines 209 and 312) and .ripple::after (lines 276-288 and 322-346). The last definition wins due to CSS cascade. Second ripple uses width/height 200% which creates larger ripple effect.
tailwind.config.js is clean - no duplicate content paths, has all required font families (heading/numbers), color tokens (gold/charcoal/silver), and animation keyframes
All pages correctly use pb-28 md:pb-6 (mobile: 7rem bottom padding for nav, desktop: 1.5rem) ensuring content is not covered by bottom nav
Bottom nav correctly uses md:hidden class - visible on mobile (390px) and hidden on desktop (1920px) ✓
seed_data_creation: Registered test_redesign_ui26@free11test.com via register flow (100 welcome coins received)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full redesign verified: 1) All pages use gold/charcoal design system (card-broadcast, card-broadcast-gold, btn-gold, btn-outline-gold, coin-indicator, font-heading, font-numbers classes all applied correctly), 2) Bottom nav has exactly 5 items (Home→/match-centre, Play→/predict, Missions→/earn, Leaderboard→/leaderboards, Profile→/profile), 3) Auth OTP flow works with dev_otp shown, 4) Shop has 16 products, 8 category tabs, category filter works, 5) ContestHub at /contest-hub/123 seeds and shows 3 platform contests. Minor: duplicate CSS classes in index.css lines 209/312 and 276/322.

mocked_apis_verified.firebase: MOCKED - OTP uses dev_otp instead of real SMS
mocked_apis_verified.resend: MOCKED - dev_otp shown in UI instead of real email
